calendar.matters:
Notice Of Mohamed Aasin Sanus Uncontested Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon & Payment For Court Reporter Fee
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GEORGE CHIKOVANI, Esq. of Putterman / Yu / Wang LLP (Tel: 415-839-8779) for Petitioner Mohamed Aasin Sanu;
Atty. ABIGAIL PARR, Esq. of Latham & Watkins LLP (Tel: 415-391-0600) for Respondent Fantex, Inc.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER MOHAMED SANU's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Mohamed Sanu's "uncontested petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
